author: zen
description: Visualize daily notes and writing activity in a calendar heatmap. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: zen
manifest.description: Visualize daily note creation and writing activity as a sidebar heatmap.
manifest.name: Calendar Heatmap

name: Calendar Heatmap

releases.author: deemsd
releases.description:
## English Release Notes

### Improvements

- Year/month note folders: Daily notes and weekly notes are now created under `year/month` folders, for example `2026/2026-06`.
- Flexible year folder names: Existing year folders named either `2026` or `2026年` are detected automatically. If neither exists, the plugin creates `2026`.
- Weekly note folder support: Weekly notes now follow the same monthly organization rule as daily notes when the setting is enabled.

## 中文发布说明

### 优化

- 按年份/月归档笔记：每日笔记和周记现在会创建到 `年份/月份` 目录下，例如 `2026/2026-06`。
- 兼容年份文件夹名称：插件会自动识别已有的 `2026` 或 `2026年`；如果都不存在，默认创建 `2026`。
- 周记同步归档：开启按月份保存后，周记会和每日笔记一样自动归入对应年份和月份目录。
releases.name: v1.8.2
